name: Raspberry-Beaujolais Sorbet
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the thawed raspberries and water in a container of a food processor or blender. Process until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture through a wire-mesh strainer, pressing the raspberries with the back of a spoon against the sides of the strainer to squeeze out juice. Discard any remaining pulp and seeds.
3. Return the strained liquid to the blender. Add sugar and the lemon juice, then process for 1 minute.
4. Pour the mixture into a 9-inch square pan and freeze until almost firm.
5. Break the mixture into chunks and place them in a large mixing bowl. Beat at low speed with an electric mixer until smooth.
6. Return to the pan and freeze until firm.
Yields: 3 cups
